detailed_execution_specification: This dataset is a longitudinal panel with repeated rows for each country and reporting period. The execution engine will honour the execution_order entries and enabled flags declared in the JSON specification, so the implementation order is fixed and no transformation is inferred or skipped silently. The preprocessing stage shall first convert Date to datetime using the parameters supplied by the JSON contract, then sort the rows chronologically by Date. The long-format panel shall then be reshaped using Date and REF_AREA as the row identifiers, INDICATOR as the source of the generated feature columns and Value as the measure. The expected output is one row per unique Date and REF_AREA combination, not one row per original long-format observation. Missing values shall be handled only in the generated feature columns using the JSON-specified strategy.
